clusters.justification: These terms share macroscopic co-activation across limbic and salience pathways, representing the broad functional axis of processing emotional valence, systemic arousal, and mood states.

Evaluating rewards, cost-benefit computations, and motivated choices co-activate within mesolimbic-striatal and ventromedial prefrontal pathways, forming the overarching neuroeconomic domain of computing subjective value.

Supported heavily by the Default Mode Network, this cognitive domain encompasses internally generated representations used to construct complex mental models of the self, personal narrative, and other agents.
